contexts.context: ...an ingenious comparison drawn from Spenser. As the <mark>girdle</mark> of Florimel, though apparently within the reach of...
...the virtuous fair destined to wear it; so the <mark>girdle</mark> of Fancy, the magic cestus of poetic powers...
.... His dress glittered with gold, and his <mark>girdle</mark> was embroidered with pearls.
